creator: ericbsd@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Dries Michiels from comment #0)
Are you running synth 2.05? I had to start using poudriere because all synth was reporting the same error that had so this is supposed to be in 2.05. I did not test it yet. you will probably have to compile synth 2.05 without synth.
